overview.description: The REX TSLA Growth & Income ETF (TSII) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in consumer discretionary equity. The fund seeks to provide weekly distributions through a synthetic covered call strategy on Tesla (TSLA), while also aiming for 105% to 150% of TSLAs daily share price performance. The actively managed fund uses both standardized exchange-traded and FLEX options, collateralized by US treasuries. TSII was launched on Jun 4, 2025 and is issued by REX Shares.
